reviews.comment:
Te cobran 250 pesos un sadwich de vacio que es minusculo, cuando vi el precio dije bueno sera para compartir, ladrones!!!

(Translated by Google)
They charge you 250 pesos for a tiny vacuum sandwich. When I saw the price, I said, well, it'll be one to share. They're thieves!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbVpMSTRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Está en una ubicación estratégica, a mitad de viaje a mar del plata. Sanitarios con muchos box que agilizan el uso. Mucha comodidad para parar con el vehículo. En el predio hay mesas de material para comer o tomar mate, mucha comodidad y espacio para parar y permanecer. Detrás hay una parrilla muy buena. Juegos para niños. Mucha comodidad

(Translated by Google)
It's strategically located, halfway to Mar del Plata. The restrooms have plenty of stalls for quick service. There's plenty of space to stop by car. The grounds have picnic tables for eating or drinking mate, and lots of comfortable seating. There's a great grill in the back. A children's playground. Very convenient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJcVptU2d3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un café en descartable $75. U$S 2 un robo. Es una estación de servicio en la ruta y cobran como si fuera un café en París.

(Translated by Google)
A disposable coffee $75. U$S 2 a robbery. It's a gas station on the route and they charge as if it were a cafe in Paris.

reviews.comment:
La recomiendo es excelente la plaza la parrilla y el puesto de embutidos los baños un lujo es la parada justa para después seguir el viaje

(Translated by Google)
I highly recommend it; the plaza, the grill, and the sausage stand are excellent, and the restrooms are luxurious. It's the perfect stop before continuing your journey.
